topic: uv — the Astral Python package & project manager

questions.q: What programming language is uv written in, and what does Astral describe uv as?
What is the exact command shown to install uv on Windows using the standalone installer?

According to the docs, which existing Python tools does uv aim to replace, and what speed improvement over pip is claimed?

Which built-in cloud deployment command does uv provide to push a project directly to AWS Lambda or Heroku?
